title: Sentence Embeddings
content:
# Sentence Embeddings

## 1. Bi-Encoder vs Cross-Encoder
*   **Bi-Encoder:** $\text{sim}(s_1, s_2) = \cos(f(s_1), f(s_2))$
*   **Cross-Encoder:** $\text{score} = f(s_1 || s_2)$

## 2. InfoNCE Contrastive Loss
$$\mathcal{L} = -\ln \frac{\exp(\cos(\mathbf{u}, \mathbf{v}) / \tau)}{\sum_{i=1}^B \exp(\cos(\mathbf{u}, \mathbf{v}_i) / \tau)}$$
